category_sources: source_facts.description says it fetches an entire site and saves it as text; official GitHub README describes sitefetch usage for fetching sites.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sitefetch; official GitHub repository README title is sitefetch.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains install, usage, matching, content selector, and API sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; the GitHub page identifies egoist/sitefetch as the project.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists sitefetch; official GitHub README says it fetches sites for AI models and shows CLI/API usage.
